title: Kana Customer Zero Activation Brief
audience: Kana founders, GTM engineer interview loop, and internal marketing operators
objective: Show how Kana should use its own platform to increase at-bats without adding manual GTM overhead.
why_now: The role explicitly owns outbound, inbound, HubSpot plumbing, paid feedback loops, and internal agent deployment.
Kana's differentiation is augmentation, not replacement, so the strongest proof is an operating system that keeps the existing stack intact.
A Customer Zero workflow turns the hiring conversation from claims about AI into visible internal usage.

agents.name: Audience Agent
agents.responsibility: Cluster target accounts by hiring, growth, SEO, and automation signals across public sources.
agents.output: Ranked account queue with titles, routes, and message angles.

agents.name: Experiment Agent
agents.responsibility: Translate signal clusters into outbound hypotheses, landing page angles, and paid-test tags.
agents.output: Experiment briefs routed into email, LinkedIn, and paid workflows.

agents.name: HubSpot Sync Agent
agents.responsibility: Write every discovery event, owner assignment, and next action back to HubSpot with no manual re-entry.
agents.output: Clean system-of-record updates and follow-up tasks.

agents.name: AEO Agent
agents.responsibility: Watch answer-engine and SEO topics, then propose content assets and distribution hooks.
agents.output: Topic backlog tied to GTM experiments and discoverability gaps.

channel_plan.goal: Resolve buyer, operator, and champion paths for the top queue entries.
Launch email variant for ops-bottleneck and AI-augmentation angles.
Add signal-led social follow-up for accounts with recent leadership activity.
Publish one supporting content asset for the highest-performing angle.

experiments: Compare 'more at-bats' framing vs 'less manual ops' framing by signal type.
Route SEO/content-pressure accounts into content-led outreach instead of direct demo asks.
Test whether funding + hiring windows outperform title-based routing alone.
hubspot_writeback: Create company and lead records from the queue output.
Write signal summary, experiment tag, source URLs, and assigned owner.
Open next-action tasks automatically for LinkedIn or email depending on route.
Mark experiment cohort membership so outbound and paid learnings share the same source of truth.
aeo_signals: Questions customers ask LLMs about AI-first demand generation
Competitor comparison prompts involving Clay, HubSpot, and agentic marketing
Emerging search terms around answer engine optimization and AI personalization
success_metrics: More qualified outbound opportunities per week
Faster campaign launch time from signal to first touch
Higher response rate from signal-led routing vs generic outbound
next_48_hours: Run the queue on live and sample data.
Review top three experiment tags with founders.
Pick one content angle and one outbound angle for same-week execution.
Use the queue output as the daily standup artifact for GTM.
